title: Skibidi Toilet Mayhem
description: The goverment has collapsed. Now it's up to you to stop the skibidi toilets!
body:
[![Projekt-bez-nazwy.png](https://i.postimg.cc/3xQjKGk3/Projekt-bez-nazwy.png)](https://postimg.cc/svKGmvPL)

### This mod is heavily inspired by dafuq boom's youtube series "skibidi toilet'' adding the series themed mobs and items.

## So far the mod is still wip so expect constant new updates.

 [![leggedbigtoiletimage.png](https://i.postimg.cc/wvFy7n7v/leggedbigtoiletimage.png)](https://postimg.cc/344JqSj5)

# Current features

## Entities

### At the moment the mod adds a total of 11 entities out of which 4 are camera alliance and the other 7 are skibidi toilets

[![Camera-manimg.png](https://i.postimg.cc/ZKpc9kG5/Camera-manimg.png)](https://postimg.cc/dLQdXfQb)
 
## Weapons

### So far the mod adds 9 weapons including 3 meele and 6 ranged/throwable weapons like knives, plungers and laser guns, able to stun enemies 

[![image.png](https://i.postimg.cc/1txhDzV7/image.png)](https://postimg.cc/7CNWkwVS)

## Structures

### There is also currently a total of  4 structures, each having unique loot and design. Some even have valuable items so look out for them 👍


## Crafting materials

### The mod also adds 2 new crafting items that can be used to obtain powerful weapons!


## Achievments, Blocks and Other 


### You can also get multiple skibidi themed building blocks and achievments in the mod though in the future there will be much more



## Good luck surviving
